title: Deleting Content Accidentally from Address or other Columns
excerpt: We have been accidentally deleting data such as addresses when hovering over the column.  Once deleted, there is no way to retrieve the data.  It doesn’t show on the activity log as previoulsy deleted, and it is not in t…

posts.author: KSP (Kelly L Simon)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have been accidentally deleting data such as addresses when hovering over the column. Once deleted, there is no way to retrieve the data. It doesn’t show on the activity log as previoulsy deleted, and it is not in the recycle. The only way to get it back is to manually enter. Since in this instance it is an address for a client that was deleted and this is our CRM we have to go back to the client or an old intake form to find that data. It would be nice if ALL fields that you can click the X to delete, have an option to add a “confirm you want to delete” pop up or an UNDO button so we don’t have to retrack steps and add extra work. I attached the screen shot.

Screen Shot 2022-08-20 at 10.19.18 AM786×250 17.6 KB

posts.author: Jorge (Jorge)
posts.cookedHtml: That “delete” icon must go! Specially on an app with no Undo like this. Why make it easier to lose data?

posts.author: nhashimoto (Naota Hashimoto)
posts.cookedHtml: An undo option would be nice. However, adding a confirm button to delete would be easier. This confirm option should be optional though.

posts.author: Dor_appSolution (Dor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Jorge @KSP @nhashimoto we developed an app that allows you to undo most of your board activities. check it out: monday.com apps marketplace

posts.author: Jorge (Jorge)
posts.cookedHtml: Unfortunately your solution depends on Monday’s activity log working correctly and that’s not happening either @Dor_appSolution

posts.author: Hammy (Paul Hammock)
posts.cookedHtml: Surely this can be fixed using a feature update to either add the option to confirm, or set an edit only option and not delete?

posts.author: jeremy_rebar.is (jeremy@rebar.is)
posts.cookedHtml: How has this not been taken care of? this is such an obvious UI glitch. We are choosing monday because we didn’t want to have to worry about stuff, but this is the opposite
